svg.text: W.A.R H.A.M.S — The Battle for Planet X
5 interlocking puzzle pieces · 61 hexes fill entire interior
Board wrapping: matching labels on opposite edges connect (A1↔A1, B2↔B2, etc.)
6 Cargo Containers (BACs land here on doubles)
Shuffle 61 hexes face-down, fill entire board
Flip all hexes face-up — reveal the planet
Place 16 number tokens on resource hexes
Shuffle 100 BACs → deal 3, draft (pick 1 pass left), 6 face-up
Snake draft: place squads on hexes
W.A.R H.A.M.S — The Battle for Planet X © Setup Diagram
